**Extracting strike data**

I need to gather some specific strike data based on the instructions. The Italian content announces a railway strike from Monday, September 30, 2024, to October 1. It mentions the strike will start at 3 AM on September 30 and end at 2 AM on October 1. The extracted data will include start and end dates in the specified format, along with a likely regional designation since it covers various train services, including airport connections.
